blockers.doc.sendstring: SAFETY_FORBIDDEN: doc.sendstring is a raw command surface because it queues arbitrary command strings into a document command stream; Wave4X keeps it non-agent-exposed and requires bespoke typed handlers instead.
blockers.module.entrypoint.define: SDK_NOT_EXPOSED: entrypoint definition is a compile/link macro/export contract, not a runtime job operation.
blockers.module.entrypoint.dispatch: HOST_UNAVAILABLE: acrxEntryPoint dispatch is owned by the AutoCAD loader and cannot be synthesized by the job dispatcher.
blockers.module.lifecycle.init: HOST_UNAVAILABLE: On_kInitAppMsg is delivered by the AutoCAD loader during module load and is not a runtime job operation.
blockers.module.lifecycle.on_load_dwg: HOST_UNAVAILABLE: On_kLoadDwgMsg is delivered by host document lifecycle dispatch; no controlled attended lifecycle route is available in this worktree.
blockers.module.lifecycle.on_unload_dwg: HOST_UNAVAILABLE: On_kUnloadDwgMsg is host-owned document lifecycle dispatch and unavailable to the integration job route.
blockers.module.lifecycle.other: HOST_UNAVAILABLE: arbitrary lifecycle message dispatch is host-owned and cannot be simulated safely by the agent job surface.
blockers.module.lifecycle.unload: HOST_UNAVAILABLE: On_kUnloadAppMsg is delivered by the loader during module unload; the job dispatcher must not invoke it directly.

next: Pane 1 may merge this branch after reviewing the Wave4X patch and handoff zip.
Do not expose doc.sendstring or arbitrary load/unload/lifecycle dispatch without a new typed safety contract.
